content.en:
"I'm going to go on to the sixth world!"

Ye Tian said.

He didn't care about the identity of the named disciple of Allah of the Kirin, he was only here to get resources.

Of course, he also knew that he was not very likely to make it to the sixth world at the moment.

According to his speculation, if you want to break through the sixth world, you need at least the combat power of a two-star god general, and you may need the combat power of a three-star god general to break through the seventh world.

But no matter what, he's going to give it a try.

If the Sixth World also has resources, even if he can't break through, he will still earn it.

"Yes!"

The machine spirit responded, and immediately let Ye Tian enter the sixth world.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the sixth world, but he didn't see too many fierce beasts, only ten fierce beasts.

These ten fierce beasts are all one-star peak god general-level fierce beasts from the breath, and if the ten are combined, the general two-star god generals may not be able to beat, after all, the gap between the one-star god general and the three-star god general is not too big for each small level, only the three-star god general and the four-star god general are really different.

Moreover, these ten fierce beasts all have a special talent.

"The appearance of the unicorn!"

Ye Tian didn't know what this talent was, but he soon knew.

Boom Boom Boom !!

The ten fierce beasts all opened the Qilin Phase, and suddenly a huge Qilin Phantom appeared in the void, and the aura of the vast sea was like an incomparably terrifying overlord.

Then, the phases of the unicorns fused one after another, and the ten phases of the unicorns merged into one, and the phases of the unicorns changed from illusory to condensed, and the breath became even more terrifying.

Ye Tian was far away, and he still felt the suppression of terror.

"It's so hard!"

Ye Tian frowned

Originally, these ten unicorn beasts were comparable to two-star god generals, but now that they have displayed this fusion of unicorn appearance, I am afraid they are enough to fight with the two-star late-stage god generals.

Bang!!!!

A unicorn foot shattered the void and stepped on, Ye Tian used the Hunyuan Domain, the Chaos Origin Ancient Well, and many defensive methods, and even the Great Destruction Technique and the Great Immortal Destruction Technique.

But it still can't be stopped!

Puff !!

A mouthful of blood spurted out of Ye Tian's mouth, and cracks appeared in his flesh, which was a sign of serious injury.

If it was other one-star late-stage god generals, they would have been killed in one move a long time ago at this moment.

The gap between the one-star peak god general and the two-star early stage god general is not big, but the gap between the one-star late god general and the two-star late stage god general is too big, and Ye Tian's combat power limit is a one-star late stage god general, so it is naturally difficult to compete with these ten unicorn beasts.

"Great Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tian used all his strength to urge this top-notch great divine power to quickly recover from his injuries, but the attack of the ten unicorn beasts was too fast, and Ye Tian couldn't beat it at all.

Bang bang bang!!!

Under the heavy blows again and again, Ye Tian finally couldn't bear it anymore.

"Constant Light Magical Power!"

Ye Tian's speed skyrocketed, dodging.

Strictly speaking, these ten fierce beasts are still at the level of one-star peak divine generals, their speed is not fast, and they can't increase their speed when they perform joint moves, and Ye Tian is so fast in the case of constant light supernatural powers, no one at the same level can match his speed, unless he has also cultivated one of the three thousand great supernatural powers and is relatively high-level speed-type supernatural powers.

"This must be cheating!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

That Qilin Allah also did not expect that someone in the universe would practice the Constant Light Divine Power, this is completely mythical!

If you don't have one of the three thousand supernatural powers, you must have the combat power of the late two-star stage to break through the sixth world.

After dodging, Ye Tian hurried to recover, and under the recovery of the Great Immortal Technique, Ye Tian's injuries quickly healed.

"Kill you!"

Ye Tian planned to say.

"Great Destruction!"

"Heaven Killing Knife!"

"Hunyuan Slash!"

......

Under the attack again and again, these ten unicorn beasts couldn't bear it.

After attacking for most of the day, the first Qilin Beast fell, followed by the second Qilin Beast, and the third Qilin Beast......

Finally, the last unicorn beast fell.

After the fall of these ten unicorn beasts, ten clouds of golden blood floated out.

Then, ten clusters of golden blood fused into a ball and turned into a drop of golden-red true blood, exuding a powerful aura.

"Qilin true blood!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is undoubtedly a powerful qilin's true essence blood, containing terrifying power, which can help cultivators refine their bodies and even transform their bloodlines, but it is not suitable for Ye Tian.

Without him, I can't look down on it!

"Good things, I don't need them, but I can give them to the Lord of Yuangu, he definitely needs them, then I can give him other treasures less!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

After receiving this drop of Qilin True Blood, Ye Tian asked to enter the seventh world to take a look,

The seventh and final world!

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the seventh world under the operation of the machine spirit.

There is only one unicorn beast in this world, and its aura far exceeds that of the previous unicorn beast.

"Two-star Extreme God General-level Qilin Fierce Beast!"

Ye Tian was extremely dignified.

In the sixth world, he could still win by tricks, but this was a genuine two-star extreme god-level unicorn beast, and its speed was definitely not slow.

And when the difference in strength is large to a certain extent, speed is not of much use, so the opponent's attack is enough to affect one's own speed, causing the speed to be suppressed, and even freezing time and space, affecting speed.

Sure enough.

This unicorn beast slapped over with one claw, Ye Tian couldn't completely dodge it, his body was directly cracked, and after another blow, Ye Tian was blown up.

But instead of dying, he became a point of light.

The next moment.

Ye Tian returned to the hall of the Qilin Hall and saw the spirit of the Qilin Palace.

"Assessor, congratulations on breaking through the sixth world, are you willing to become a disciple of Allah Qilin?"

The machine spirit said excitedly.

"What, a personal disciple?" Ye Tian was stunned, "Isn't it necessary to break through the seventh world to become a personal disciple?"

The instrument spirit was startled, and then smiled: "It should be the previous examiner who told you this, right? Indeed, others need to break through the seventh world to become a personal disciple, but you don't need to! Your performance is too good, and you have also practiced three top divine powers, and you are all top geniuses in the chaos! If you are willing to become a personal disciple of Qilin Allah, you can definitely obtain countless resources, and Qilin Allah will also cultivate you with all your might!"

"Why are you so excited?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Because you have become a personal disciple, I can leave this universe!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Although it is a machine spirit, it also has wisdom, it is too boring to stay in the universe, and there is no way to leave, and it can't even go out of the Qilin Palace, otherwise the origin of the universe will wipe it out.
